hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path', d.get('path', '')))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(REQUIREMENT|ARCHITECTURE)\.md$'; then echo '{"feedback": "WARNING: Editing source-of-truth file. Ensure TODO.md has a DOCS task for this change."}'; fi

OUTPUT=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('output',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qiE '(BUILD FAILURE|Tests run:.*Failures:|FAILED)'; then echo '{"feedback": "WARNING: Build or test failure detected. Create a TEST-NNN or BUG-NNN task in TODO.md before continuing."}'; fi
